name: Easy Hungarian Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a large soup kettle, brown the beef on all sides in butter. Remove the beef and set aside.
2. In the same kettle, brown the onion and garlic in butter until soft, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in paprika.
4. Return the beef to the kettle. Add the tomato soup, water, caraway seeds, and carrots. Bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat, cover, and let simmer for 45 minutes.
6. Stir in the noodles and green beans over high heat until they are well incorporated into the soup.
7. Once the soup begins to boil again, reduce the heat, cover, and continue cooking for about 20 more minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Stir in the sour cream until it is fully blended. Heat through, but do not allow the mixture to boil.
Serves 8.
